reviews.review_description:
Ok it needs some work tutorial is not happening! And you can only interact with one robot arm and program/ record the movement for one ….this is not good ….also no object reset! ….I’m interested in buying a robot arm or two and the remote work possibly but I’m not sure if this is helpful I kinda want my money back but I also understand the meta ver s is still under construction 🚧  this application could be a pioneer project for remote learning/work / other. 

I was here here I was was I here yes I was ….. I’m spoonbaby aka Sarah Kline a real name and real person in a very deep fake world where fake is better than the real thing! And that’s a compliment 
👩🏼
